submission.title: I'm and ENFP male who has feelings for his INTJ bestfriend, Please help.
submission.body:
As you read the title, I'm an ENFP male who has developed feelings for my best friend who is an INTJ. We have been best friends for not much long tho, just few months now, and she was there when I broke up with my last girlfriend. The reason I got feelings for her is because she has been tagging along with me to my spontaneous adventures almost all the time which I was always wanting from all my past relationships and actually caring for me. We get along too much like there's not a single day that we don't meet up.

Now the problems is, I don't know if the feelings are mutual.

She has never dated anyone ever and I have been in a couple of relationships before. She is the one who always calls/texts me to meet up which I have found out through my research that's rare for you guys. Me being an ENFP I have always been flirty and she doesn't seem to have any problem or revolts around the flirts I throw everyday but she never flirts back.

She has also mentioned that she is struggling mentally which I try to support through as much as I can. We have went to quite a lot of places together and we meet up everyday going to a new adventure or just chilling in the park. We also hold hands sometimes but I don't know what that means.

I really cherish her I don't want to mess up what we have but I don't know how to find out if the feelings are mutual. Please help!

(Sorry if my English is bad, it's not my first language)

comments.body: if she is sticking to you being an extrovert and initiating text and contacts then its a good sign she really values you, or high chances she likes you, cuz i being an intj female will cutt off people or hardly put efforts who i dont care about and specifically dealing with extrovert takes 100x energy so, its a good sign she is putting that much efforts to just being with you. go for her she may already likes you.

>Now the problems is, I don't know if the feelings are mutual.

Nothing in life is a guarantee. It is always expressed in probabilities. No matter how obvious the signs may be.

You can try to add up what activities indicate that she is attracted to you, and subtract that from events that you feels repulsed by you. So far it seems to be pointing in the right direction.

>(+) She is the one who always calls/texts me to meet up which I have found out through my research that's rare for you guys.  
(+) Me being an ENFP I have always been flirty and she doesn't seem to have any problem or revolts around the flirts I throw everyday  
(-/?) but she never flirts back.  
(+) We have went to quite a lot of places together  
(+) we meet up everyday going to a new adventure or just chilling in the park.  
(+) We also hold hands sometimes but I don't know what that means.  
(?)  I don't want to mess up what we have

But I do think part of the problem is, you are worrying too much that you might screw up such a delicate match. Do not worry too much. Be a person with a healthy attitude, exercise proper etiquette, etc. Those matter first before worrying too much about MBTI nuances.

But since she is introverted, give her some space and time to process. Don't look "needy" in front of her, but rather listen to her. Listening goes a long way. You don't necessarily need to do an action each time you listen to her, but just to listen to her. She will find it very attractive.

An INTJ female taking the time to message you, hang out with you, and interact with you? She's definitely interested/intrigued by you.  I'm not saying she wants to date/marry you, but you definitely have a good shot.  Ask her out to dinner or something more special than just 'hanging out' and see if she's receptive to it.
Thanks for the advice 😊

Yeah Maybe I'm worrying too much. I like your systematic approach man! Oh and I am very good listener, our hang outs are usually her venting about her day or childhood trauma as I quietly and purposefully listen and remember everything. So yeah i got that going for me. Thank you for your Advice! 😊

Yes. If you are unsure what to do if something happen, just listen. Don't panic. This is my big tip for extroverts dating introverts. It works most of the time.

If you listen and don't say anything, it will mean you are paying attention to your partner. This is universal, basic human interaction. Baseline. Listening = respect.

She is telling her personal problems to you? INTJs rarely do that! This shows she really trusts you and is comfortable around you. I mean as an INTJ myself I rarely share my mental health problems with my own family even. The only one who knows about it is my only best friend. So if she is "telling" you this, than you must be special to her.
Tell her she's cute, that you find her attractive, directly. Look her in the eyes.

I'm a male INFJ best friend to a female ENFP. we've been very very close for over a decade. Being in the inverse situation to yours, advice is that you should absolutely sit down with this person (in person) and talk about these things. I know there is a 100% chance I'd never go to my extrovert first about it, they would have to be the one to say something. I'd be far too scared of pushing them away. let it be a slow conversation, because it needs to be one. don't try to put expectations on them, but explain where you are honestly. 

be clear that you want whatever dynamic they want, because that ought to be how you feel. if your introvert wants friendship, be their friend. if they want to give it a chance, cool. but TAKE IT SLOW. I wish I had taken a lot of things slower in life. I know that if my extrovert ever came to me with these feelings we would take it very slow and cherish each and every moment of it.

Eww, holding hands?

Why would she hold hands if she didn't like  you? Just tell her.
Yeah I can try that. We are planning a vacation together too before this year ends. Thank you for the advice!  😊
Oh okay. Yes I am the only person who knows EVERYTHING about her. Thank you for the Advice! 😊
I do that everyday but she says there's something wrong with me 😂😂😂

I mean she had a situationship with a guy from work a while back and she wasn't interested in him but still held hands just for going with the flow so I'm puzzled if she's still going with my flow or she actually means it!
I'm getting all anxious and stuff so it's difficult for me to go slow. But I'll go slow still!! Thank you for the Advice! 😊
Cool
Quite misleading on her side to be honest. Well, you're going to have to tell her about your feelings and just ask how she feels. Her behaviour is unclear

Okay... One thing is (almost) for sure. The girl is an INTJ! XD

Here's my suggestion. Say something like this, "So, we're already hanging out every day and we're each other's best friend. What if we could be more? Let's try that and see what happens? If it doesn't work out, it doesn't work out. It doesn't have to ruin our friendship.  It'll be a funny story to tell the grandchildren we won't have together. What do you think? Should be go out on a date?"

...as an INTJ male, if I were acting like this toward any female, I would clearly be interested in them on a more than friends level...as an INTJ male, if I were putting this much energy into a male-female friendship, I would be thinking that this is something I want to continue.

As others have said, shoot your shot. You already have a good history of past adventures...seek experiences, not things.

Good luck, please keep us advised!

She thinks she's not good enough for you. Kiss her. At least that's what I would do. These days you might get arrested for not first getting her to sign a contract in front of professional witnesses, but in my day you just planted a kiss on someone under the circumstances you're describing.
Thank you for your advice! 😊
Yeah let's see. Thank you for your advice tho! 😊
I kiss her hand quite often if that counts. But if you mean on the mouth wouldn't that be a bit you know, too much at this stage?
Yeah I'll try doing that in the near future. Thank you for your advice! ☺️

If she don‘t Flirts back, its probably cuz she missed the flirt. Im an INTJ male but I also often miss them.

Also she is probably waiting to be shure they are flirts so she don‘t makes a flirt in a flirtless conversation.

Oh. Damn that's a whole situation 😭😂
Thank you for your advice man! 😊
You're welcome. Good luck. :)

I was that girl in the past.  My first new buddy in college was this dude who was a Commerce student. We were college buddies, always heading to and from school together. At one point, i got a little obsessed with him, but not in a lovey-dovey way, you know? I wanted things to stay chill, so I never spilled about the strange feelings I was catching. Fast forward three months, and poof, i realised those odd feelings vanished. I still treasured our friendship, but the whole crush thing was history. No regrets. 
Anyway, i'm pretty sure she's into you, bud. XD
Your welcome and good luck!
Ultimately that's up to you but based on what you've said I'd argue if anything you should have done it already.
You're not really helping my situation 😭😭

just be advised, I'm talking SLOW. and genuine. like ​I wouldn't trade what I have with my ENFP for anything in the world. And I mean that completely literally. I wouldn't trade it for a billion dollars. Wouldn't trade it for rulership of the earth. Nothing. there isn't a price, I'd let the world burn first.

But this took a long time, and a lot of ups and downs, to develop to what it is. There were good days, there were bad days. To what exact degree fleeting thoughts of romance have been felt on both sides, I can't say for sure. But I can say we've never acted on it. And if it never is that, I won't feel like I've in any way missed out on something more valuable to me than the world. Consider that this is the kind of depth some people think about and understand these things.

What we have has outlasted a lot of romantic relationships on both sides. That's something to consider as well.
Good luck, mate :)

"...she never flirts back." If you want to be her brother, then keep going.

I don't know about other women, but I definitely do not flirt with a man I don't want to kiss. This is assuming there's no conflict of interest.
start wearing a watch.  If she takes it, it's game on
INTJ female here, but am I the only one who thinks our bud here should shoot his shot because I think the BFF, even when she's not aware of it yet, actually likes him too ._.

Kiss her!? What? R U an intj? You dont sound like one! Kissing someone without their consent is sexual harassment no matter what time it is " in your days" or "these days". Dont go around giving useless advice which can get someone else in trouble. Smh
It isn't if they want you to kiss them
Ummm my dude. That is her 😬
Did you kiss her?
Nope
But she's seen the thread? What happened? Crashed and burned?
Dude the one you replied to, Sunefficient583, that is her, she found the post

How do u know if someone wants u to kiss them without knowing how they feel. Do u have any idea how ridiculous u sound. I will repeat what i said KISSING WITHOUT SOMEONE'S CONSENT IS SEXUAL HARRASMENT.
But she knows you like her now
You sound like a very tedious child who has zero experience of the world beyond online echo chambers

submission.title: I'm an ENFP male who has feelings for my INTJ best friend, What to do?
submission.body:
As you read the title, I'm an ENFP male who has developed feelings for my best friend who is an INTJ. We have been best friends for not much long tho, just few months now, and she was there when I broke up with my last girlfriend. The reason I got feelings for her is because she has been tagging along with me to my spontaneous adventures almost all the time which I was always wanting from all my past relationships and actually caring for me. We get along too much like there's not a single day that we don't meet up.

Now the problems is, I don't know if the feelings are mutual.

She has never dated anyone ever and I have been in a couple of relationships before. She is the one who always calls/texts me to meet up which I have found out through my research that's rare for INTJs. Me being an ENFP I have always been flirty and she doesn't seem to have any problem or revolts around the flirts I throw everyday but she never flirts back.

She has also mentioned that she is struggling mentally which I try to support through as much as I can. We have went to quite a lot of places together and we meet up everyday going to a new adventure or just chilling in the park. We also hold hands sometimes but I don't know what that means.

I really cherish her I don't want to mess up what we have but I don't know how to find out if the feelings are mutual. Please help!

(Sorry if my English is bad, it's not my first language)

comments.body: I mean based on what you are saying, it sounds like she probably has feelings for you too. But the thing I’m concerned about is that she is struggling mentally. Because you don’t necessarily want to get into a relationship yet if she is very mentally unstable, because that would likely lead to a short relationship if its bad for her. Also you may have to take the lead since she never dated anyone before and she probably doesn’t know the cues too. And the only way to find out if the feelings are mutual are to discuss it with her how much you like her and would appreciate going out with her and such etc etc

It sounds like you're in a tough spot because while there's a chance she feels the same, her mental health struggles might make things more complicated. You’ll need to be careful about not rushing into anything that could harm her emotionally.
Navigating feelings in friendship can be tricky, but sometimes taking a leap of faith is the most rewarding adventure.

Ive been married to an INTJ for 14 yrs(together 16) and from my experience the best thing you can do is just ask her. Directly. No hints. Be blunt and direct. If she has feelings for you then you can see where that leads. If she doesnt then you can remain friends because it’ll probably be more awkward for you than it would be for her and if you can overcome that then you will probably have a friend for life.
Give it some time, let it be natural. It it’s only been a few month let the feelings settle a little and get to know her more!

Him: "hey, do you love me?"  
Her: "no"  
Him: "okay"

  
life goes on
Her (2 years later): Hey, I was just kidding. I actually like you and can tolerate you. Let's go out.

I am providing my perspective from an INTJ lens: we dont usually spend time with people we dont like, let alone going spontaneous, and everyday. We also rarely initiate calls/texts first unless we really really like the person. All the signs you said are big signals that she likes you, imo. We INTJs are not the best in expressing emotions, we dont flirt. We are very subtle with our emotions, we have soft heart, and dont want to get hurt or hurt other people, you need to see between the lines. 

Mental struggle is often a challenge for INTJs, we have so much going on in our heads. We try to solve everything ourselves. But thats why we need people who can bring light, sunshine and positivity into our dark world. In my experience, I’ve been lucky to have found a caring ENFP friend who’s there for me and melted my dark thoughts away.

Him: "really? :D oh my god, thats great to hear. We can go out this friday night"  
Her: "nah, im just pulling your leg. I was a lesbian all along... LMAO"

submission.title: [UPDATE] I'm an ENFP male who has feelings for his INTJ bestfriend, Please help.
submission.body:
[Link to the original post](https://www.reddit.com/r/intj/comments/1fyu0f8/im_and_enfp_male_who_has_feelings_for_his_intj/)

Hello INTJ folks! Things have been wild after my last post. I'll directly get into the meat of the situation. Sorry but this a long post because it goes over the events that took place after it.

\[Night of the initial post\]

On the same night that I posted my last post about advice on my feelings for my INTJ best friend we went for burgers at night. While having eating, It accidently slipped from my mouth that I had blocked her on reddit (we know each other's accs) and she was PISSED! She asked if I had posted something. I didn't want to upset her more so I said yes I have and I won't tell what because it's not the right time. She was hella mad and trying to grab my phone to check. I was keen on not letting her know tho. She was angry the whole way back.

So we were riding back on my motorcycle and some balloon seller let go of his balloons so we grabbed one. We came to her house and she was still upset. She was trying to dig into what the post is about but was not giving any info. Then we didn't know what to do with the balloon. I told her to keep it but she didn't want it. Neither did I want to keep it because I wanted her to have it. So we were playing around I was curious as to will it really explode in a fireball?(balloons over here are filled with hydrogen) So I pulled out my lighter and lit it up.

It exploded. Burning my hand as a result 😂😂 (i know that was stupid).

She saw it and ran to her house and ran back with her medicine pouch. She was out of breath and pulled my hand to apply ointments and was scolding me on how stupid I am. Her reaction was like I'm dying or something. That's where I melted (I have had a rough childhood and it was the first time someone actually looked out for me). So after she was done, I handed her my phone and said you can look at the post.

She asked "are you sure?" I said yeah

"Why weren't you showing it to me before?"

I replied "I was scared of losing you"

She went through the post and and even the comments. She said she saw this coming but not this soon. I looked away as she read cause I was too embarrassed to face her. After she was done, she said "I need to think about it". I said cool. Then I got on my bike and was ready to leave without saying a single word. She was just staring at me and asked "Do you want a hug?" I nodded yes. Longest hug we ever had.

I was thinking things are over between us. I went to smoke and rode for half an hour to empty my mind. We didn't talk much on text at that night later and went to sleep.

\[The Next Day\]

She called me at 7 am to remind me to go to gym but I was asleep and couldn't pick up. I woke up at 8 and Then she texted me to pick her up in 15 mins. We met and had tea together as she kept asking how and when the feelings first started . It was an awkward convo for me because I have never confessed my feelings first in my whole life. After that I dropped her off to her work and I was depressed.

She saved the snap of the tea I had sent which she very rarely does. I asked why'd you save it? She replied "This will remind me that we had tea..." I didn't get it and replied "We do that everyday?" then it hit me and I was in tears. I called her up and asked "is this goodbye?" while half crying. She said "No? it's not. Wtf is wrong with you?".

Fast forward to afternoon. She msgd me that she's leaving for home, I asked you want me to pick you up? she said sure why not. I pick her up and we go to the park. She's reading my post again over there and looking at the new comments. I asked don't you feel awkward? She said "about what?" I replied "that I confessed?" She says "No you have not. You just posted about it." Then I realized I haven't said it yet. i was feeling hella confident and confessed it to her. "H, I have feelings for. What you gonna do about it?" she said "I don't know". We had a good laugh and then I dropped her at her place and went to work.

We met again at night and played uno together in the park. Then she had bought new nail paint. I applied it to her nails as we talked about our day then we went to drop her home. There I pointed out that she still hasn't answered me. I told her to do it after a few days cause I need some time to mentally prepare and move on from my last break up. We chatted for sometime and I told her I'm gonna update on the last post and she has been excited to see what I'm gonna write now (Hey there H, I know you're reading this ;)

\[Today\]

We met again for tea in the morning and it was our usual routine of uno and tea. We were talking about my feelings and all the shit that's been going on. She kept asking me when I'm gonna post the update. I said afternoon. I dropped her off to work and went to do some other stuffs. She texted me in the evening if I posted it but I was too occupied with stuff so couldn't post.

Then we met at night right now. Things were sad, I was feeling down, overthinking about what will happen next. She was her usual self asking me things about why I did I get back with my ex and broke up again when I had feelings for her and I had to explain that I didn't have feelings for her when I got back with my ex. Then we were pondering about what to do now. She hasn't decided on an answer yet. She asked me why I was overthinking about it and I said "I'm scared of losing you" then she said but we will still be best friends no matter what happens. I said yeah but if shit goes south I will have to stop hanging out with you to stop my feelings for you. She said she  didn't think in that way and then we both became depressed.

To uplift the mood, I told her what I had in my mind if it was a yes (exploring together, fun dates, a house in the woods and a bunch of pets, etc). Then she mentioned "what if it's a no? we will still be friends?" I said "yeah". "What if you get a partner in future and she has a problem with me?" she replied, I said "We'll have to cut off" and it became dead silent.

A couple of mins later she was standing there talking about something. I don't remember what because I was too emotional. I just got up and hugged her for 5 mins. I asked her, "when is the soonest that you can answer me?" She said in November. I said "Alright. Let's just get done with this". Then I was getting ready to leave and started raining heavily. She opened her umbrella and we hugged under it now even longer than ever before. I said I like this feeling while hugging. She said she does too. I jokingly said "Damn wanna have this for the rest of your life?" She giggled. I told her, if she wasn't gonna be travelling in a few days I would've loved dance in the rain with her right now. She chuckled. Then I left for home and she went to hers.

P.S. We were holding hands throughout this whole interaction.

Now it's 3 am and I'm here sitting at home, love songs blasting on my ears as I write this. Completely stuck in a standstill of emotions with her. Idk what to expect but idk why, I'm getting a good feeling about this. Maybe I'm gonna get the heartbreak of my life. Or the girl I always dreamed of having. What do y'all think?

Let's see\~

TL;DR - I accidently confessed my feelings to my best friend and now we are in a standstill.

comments.body:
>we know each other's accs

You know it's not a far fetched idea for her to browse reddit offline and see this same post.

Also I don't see the urgency of this post with the "Please Help" title. If anything, it's a misleading eyesore SOS signal that attracts people's attention, much like a clickbait thumbnail in youtube. You're already on the right track, just act normally. Relationship posts are not a lifeline here. Again, you are worrying too much you just recently posted.

H, I know you're reading.

Get the eff out of your head and give this a try, girl!!!! :)

Reading the day to day rollercoaster that is apparently an ENFP is a trip. 

The highlight was when she took a picture of some tea, you started crying about it and then she asked “WTF is wrong with you?”. This exchange made sense
i wish she accept its, but damn this whole situation is such mess for me to even read i wonders how you two are leaving it.
I know right 😭😭😭

As an INTJ woman who is now in a relationship with an INFJ, let me share our story. My ISFJ ex broke up with me last 2020, called off the wedding, or something like that. I was heartbroken, but as an INTJ, I analyzed our relationship, me as a girlfriend and him as a boyfriend. And I realized I was better off without him. 

So, in November 2020, this INFJ co-worker of mine started messaging me and asked me out. We went on a date. After the first date, I told him that if he did not ask me something, where this date and exchange of messages would go, I wouldn't see him anymore outside work. 

Second date in 2021, he asked me if I liked him, and I said yes. And I asked him if he liked me. He said yes (like he should have, haha). We have been in a relationship for 3 years. 

What I want to say is, as an INTJ woman, I don't want to waste my time hanging out with you and thinking about what our status will be. I will not do friends' things with you if I want you to be my boyfriend. If you are still at a standstill, maybe for her, you are just a friend.

PS. It's my INTJ in me that I tend to compartmentalize my relationship. You are either a friend, a co-worker, or a boyfriend. Not all of the above. 

  
PPS. My boyfriend is now working in another company. And yes, I don't treat my co-workers as my friends.
Thank you for your POV but I don't think We can relate with this because she has her colleagues as friends and I'm also her music tutor who happened to also become her best friend off-campus.
H. Here.....I still cant believe he cried because of it.....I asked him like 3 times🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣 and then I realised HE ACTUALLY DID CRY!🤣

H, if you are reading this,

 I know, what it feels like to wonder. I don’t know what the basic characteristics of intj are, but i am typed as one by multiple tests. So, i will give my pov, maybe it will help you.

I haven’t been in this situation exactly, but I have this “friend” that probably likes me (I don’t exactly know, because we never can know unless she says in explicitly clear words, that she does like me. But, there have been enough signs.). And i like her too. 

I hate that it has to be this way. But i am forever in doubt. And i know that it may be causing her great pain because of my unsure nature. Because it certainly is causing me pain too.

I know i should ask her clearly if she likes me, but i am scared. What if she doesn’t? And, if she does, what if i hurt her in the future? I mean, i am too unsure of myself too. I am way too immature right now. 

But, unsure-ness aside. If this person likes you, and is a good person morally, has no addiction or bad tendencies, and have always cared about you and stood by you even if things were wrong,

It won’t go wrong. You will not end up hurting him. It will not end up hurting you. 
You both are too mature for that to happen.

Take care, you both. May you find what’s best for you.
